stemHtml: Regarding the obstacle limited take-off mass, which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: A take-off in the direction of an obstacle is also permitted in tail wind condition.
options.b: The obstacle limited mass can never be lower than the climb limited take-off mass.
options.c: Wind speed plays no role when calculating this particular mass.
options.d: The maximum bank angle which can be used is 10°.
